SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator

Class CommandTimeoutWatcher

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CommandTimeoutWatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class CommandTimeoutWatcher extends Object implements Runnable
Watches in-flight commands and marks them as failed if no ACK is received within the configured timeout window.

When the ICoordinator dispatches a Command to a device via the Message Bus, it registers the command here via watch(Command). This runner periodically scans all registered commands and, for any that have been waiting longer than timeoutMs, calls ICoordinator.handleCommandResult(String, CommandStatus) with CommandStatus.FAILURE, unblocking the coordinator's response path.

When an ACK does arrive, the coordinator calls ack(String) to remove the command from the watch list so it is not timed out.

This Runnable runs in its own dedicated thread, sleeping for checkIntervalMs between scans. It is intentionally separate from the Netty I/O threads so that a slow command scan does not delay network I/O.

Usage: 

   CommandTimeoutWatcher watcher = new CommandTimeoutWatcher(coordinator, 10000, 500);
   Thread t = new Thread(watcher, "cmd-timeout-watcher");
   t.setDaemon(true);
   t.start();

   // When dispatching a command:
   watcher.watch(command);

   // When an ACK arrives:
   watcher.ack(commandId);

    Constructors

    Description
    CommandTimeoutWatcher(ICoordinator coordinator, long timeoutMs, long checkIntervalMs)
    Constructs the CommandTimeoutWatcher.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ack(String commandId)
    Removes a command from the watch list because its ACK has been received.
    void
    run()
    Periodically scans in-flight commands and times out any that have exceeded timeoutMs without receiving an ACK.
    void
    stop()
    Stops the watcher loop.
    void
    watch(Command command)
    Registers a command for timeout watching.

  • Constructor Details

    • CommandTimeoutWatcher

      public CommandTimeoutWatcher(ICoordinator coordinator, long timeoutMs, long checkIntervalMs)
      Constructs the CommandTimeoutWatcher.
      Parameters:
      coordinator - the coordinator to call when a command times out
      timeoutMs - ms a command may wait for an ACK (typically 10000)
      checkIntervalMs - ms between each scan of in-flight commands (typically 500)

  • Method Details

    • run

      public void run()
      Periodically scans in-flight commands and times out any that have exceeded timeoutMs without receiving an ACK.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • watch

      public void watch(Command command)
      Registers a command for timeout watching. Called by the coordinator immediately after publishing a command to the Message Bus.
      Parameters:
      command - the command that has been dispatched and is awaiting an ACK

    • ack

      public void ack(String commandId)
      Removes a command from the watch list because its ACK has been received. Called by the coordinator's ICoordinator.handleCommandResult(java.lang.String, edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.CommandStatus) path when a successful or failed ACK arrives before the timeout.
      Parameters:
      commandId - the ID of the command that was acknowledged

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the watcher loop. Safe to call from any thread.
